scripts.test: gitclaw --dir ./redline -p "Run a gap analysis on policies/data-privacy.md against GDPR requirements"
scripts.scan: gitclaw --dir ./redline -p "Use the policy-scanner tool to scan all policies in the policies/ directory"
scripts.workflow: gitclaw --dir ./redline -p "Run the policy-update-flow workflow on policies/access-control.md"
